items.name: Accelerate Inbound Lead Qualification
items.description: Triage and score inbound MQLs to shorten time-to-first-touch.

items.name: Reduce Tier-1 Support Handle Time
items.description: Auto-resolve common tier-1 tickets via knowledge-base lookup and templated replies.

items.name: Flag High-Risk Vendor Contracts
items.description: Scan inbound vendor agreements for clauses that breach procurement policy.

items.name: Expedite GDPR Subject Access Requests
items.description: Aggregate personal data across CRM/HRIS/billing to fulfill SAR within statutory window.

items.name: Personalize Onboarding Email Sequence
items.description: Tailor first-30-day emails to product-usage signals to lift activation rate.

items.name: Automate Month-End Journal Entries
items.description: Generate recurring accruals and inter-company reclasses from ERP postings.
